query:
SELECT pv.id as variantId, pv.variantCode, pv.variantType, pv.isDefault,
       vcl.id as linkId, vcl.customerId as linkedCustomerId
FROM product_variants pv
LEFT JOIN variant_customer_links vcl ON pv.id = vcl.variantId
WHERE pv.variantCode IN ('VAR0017', 'VAR0011', 'DC-001-GRY-V030')
ORDER BY pv.variantCode, vcl.customerId;
